title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with a single command-line tool and an OpenAI-compatible API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLMs or embedders in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”); import models, RAG, multi-user, dark mode.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and CLI wrapper that adds conversation memory, syntax highlighting and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub-Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Android compatibility and fluent API.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented-Generation example using Ollama, ChromaDB and LangChain.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Lightweight Next.js chatbot frontend that talks to a local Ollama instance over REST.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by the community; use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# / .NET client for Ollama with async methods and strongly-typed chat requests.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform Flutter desktop app to manage and chat with Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama in Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust client crate providing strongly-typed APIs and Tokio-based async streaming.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Simple Python Slack bot using Socket-Mode to answer questions powered by an Ollama backend.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a command to summarize selected notes using a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot written in Go that proxies chats to Ollama with per-user model selection and streaming replies.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Community-curated collection of custom Modelfiles and quantization recipes for niche models.
